name: Amaretto Peach Cheesecake2
recipeInstructions:
1. BASE: Beat margarine and sugar until light and fluffy. Blend in egg.
2. Add flour; mix well. Spread dough onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
3. BODY: Combine cream cheese, sugar, and flour, mixing on medium speed on electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Add peaches and liqueur; mix well. Pour over crust. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F; continue baking 1 hour and 5 minutes. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan. Chill. Garnish with toasted almond slices and additional peach slices, if desired.
